guardrails.body: Hanken centers its profile on business and economics rather than technology-led design.
guardrails.title: Business focus

guardrails.body: Its research positioning stays close to management and industry questions.
guardrails.title: Applied lens

guardrails.body: Use Hanken as the business-school contrast point when comparing it with Aalto.
guardrails.title: Different role

signals.body: Hanken specializes in business, economics, and social sciences.
signals.title: Academic Expertise

signals.body: The institution emphasizes practical research with direct industry application.
signals.title: Practical Research Focus

signals.body: Hanken maintains strong reputation for expertise in applied social sciences.
signals.title: Social Sciences Strength

signals.body: The university integrates theoretical knowledge with real-world business challenges.
signals.title: Industry Integration

summary: Hanken excels in business, economics, and social sciences with practical research focus.
title: Hanken: Business and Social Sciences Focus
